maxRunningTooltip: Limits active running or thinking sessions. Users will be asked to wait if the limit is exceeded.
maxCachedTooltip: Limits sessions cached in memory. The oldest idle sessions will be released automatically if exceeded.
saveConfigFailed: Failed to save settings to the database
enableTitleSummaryTooltip: When enabled, after the first turn of a new session, the system will call AI in the background to summarize a short title for the session. When disabled, summarization is skipped and the default title is used.
